description: DAMA-DMBOK 2.0 knowledge area coverage mapping for trade surveillance platform

knowledge_areas.name: Data Governance
knowledge_areas.description: Overall management of data availability, usability, integrity, and security
platform_capabilities: Compliance requirement mapping (MAR, MiFID II, Dodd-Frank, FINRA, EMIR, SEC)

knowledge_areas.name: Data Architecture
knowledge_areas.description: Models, policies, rules, and standards governing data collection, storage, integration, and use
platform_capabilities: Medallion architecture (Bronze to Silver to Gold to Platinum)
Entity relationship modeling with ISO/FIX alignment

knowledge_areas.name: Data Modeling & Design
knowledge_areas.description: Analysis, design, building, testing, and maintenance of data models
platform_capabilities: Entity Designer with field metadata and relationships

knowledge_areas.name: Data Storage & Operations
knowledge_areas.description: Design, implementation, and support of stored data to maximize its value
platform_capabilities: Lakehouse architecture with Apache Iceberg concepts

knowledge_areas.name: Data Security
knowledge_areas.description: Policies and procedures to ensure proper authentication, authorization, access, and auditing
platform_capabilities: Role-based access control (6 roles: admin, compliance_officer, analyst, auditor, data_steward, viewer)
Data masking policies (redact, partial, tokenize, hash, generalize)

knowledge_areas.name: Data Integration & Interoperability
knowledge_areas.description: Processes related to movement and consolidation of data
platform_capabilities: Bronze to Silver field mapping with transformation rules
Silver to Gold aggregation and enrichment pipelines
Connector framework for external data sources

knowledge_areas.name: Data Quality
knowledge_areas.description: Planning, implementation, and control of activities that apply quality management techniques to data
platform_capabilities: 6 quality dimensions (completeness, accuracy, consistency, timeliness, uniqueness, validity)
Quality scoring engine with configurable weights
Quarantine service for data quality failures

knowledge_areas.name: Reference & Master Data
knowledge_areas.description: Ongoing reconciliation and maintenance of core critical shared data
platform_capabilities: Golden record management for 4 entity types (product, venue, account, trader)
301 golden records with matching and merging rules

knowledge_areas.name: Document & Content Management
knowledge_areas.description: Activities surrounding the lifecycle of unstructured data
platform_capabilities: Business glossary with ISO 11179 term definitions

knowledge_areas.name: Metadata Management
knowledge_areas.description: Planning, implementation, and control of metadata
platform_capabilities: Everything is metadata: entities, calculations, settings, models — all JSON on disk
Metadata Explorer for browsing all metadata types
22+ metadata types (entities, calculations, settings, detection_models, widgets, etc.)
Metadata-driven navigation, grids, views, themes, and workflows

knowledge_areas.name: Data Warehousing & Business Intelligence
knowledge_areas.description: Management of analytical data processing and the activities supporting business intelligence
platform_capabilities: Platinum tier with KPI generation and model effectiveness metrics
Interactive SQL Console with Monaco editor
Alert score distribution and trend analysis
